notableEvents.label: Logan O'Hoppe GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Logan O'Hoppe grounds into a double play, second baseman Hyeseong Kim to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Josh Lowe out at 2nd. Logan O'Hoppe out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Freddie Freeman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Freddie Freeman grounds into a double play, first baseman Nolan Schanuel to shortstop Zach Neto to pitcher Grayson Rodriguez. Shohei Ohtani out at 2nd. Freddie Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Adam Frazier to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Dalton Rushing out at 2nd. Miguel Rojas out at 1st.
